markdown:
- **Source A:** The Adam paper (Kingma & Ba, 2014) specifies, as good default settings for the tested machine learning problems in Algorithm 1, β1 = 0.9, β2 = 0.999, and ε = 10⁻⁸, with β2 = 0.999 repeated in Algorithm 2 (AdaMax). [1][2]
- **Source B:** "Attention Is All You Need" (Vaswani et al., 2017), Section 5.3 Optimizer, reports using the Adam optimizer with β1 = 0.9, β2 = 0.98 and ε = 10⁻⁹ for training the Transformer models. [3]

Unresolved from the available corpus evidence:
- resolution

Sources
[1] Adam: A Method for Stochastic Optimization, unsectioned, p. 2
[2] Adam: A Method for Stochastic Optimization, unsectioned, p. 9
[3] Attention Is All You Need, 5.3 Optimizer, p. 7
summary: The Adam paper (Kingma & Ba, 2014) specifies, as good default settings for the tested machine learning problems in Algorithm 1, β1 = 0.9, β2 = 0.999, and ε = 10⁻⁸, with β2 = 0.999 repeated in Algorithm 2 (AdaMax).
